text: Machine learning is a type of artificial intelligence where computers learn from data. One common approach is supervised learning. In this method, the computer is given training data, which includes examples with correct answers. For example, the system might receive thousands of photos labeled “cat” or “dog.” The computer uses this data to build a model, which is like a set of rules. Once the model is ready, it can make predictions on new, unseen data. After making predictions, engineers check the model’s accuracy—how often it gets the right answer. Better training data usually leads to higher accuracy and more reliable predictions.
